---
title: "graph_integrity.test.ts"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/tests/node/pennyone/graph_integrity.test.ts"
loc: 56
complexity: 4
logic_score: 3.17
style_score: 5.64
intel_score: 9.26
overall_score: 6.58
---

## Intent
A functional component of the Corvus Star static analysis matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Import and utilize via the standard project structure.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 3.2/10
- **Style [S]**: 5.6/10
- **Intel [I]**: 9.3/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 11 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [test](file://node:test)
- [describe](file://node:test)
- [it](file://node:test)
- [*](file://node:assert)
- [runScan](file://../../../src/tools/pennyone/index.js)
- [*](file://fs/promises)
- [*](file://path)

### Exports
- `statsDir`
- `graphPath`
- `exists`
- `raw`
- `graph`
- `foundDependency`
- `foundIntent`
- `depExists`
- `raw1`
- `graph1`
- `fileCount1`
- `depCount1`
- `raw2`
- `graph2`
- `depCount2`
